2606.06920.title: The Fine-Tuning Trap: Evaluating Negative Transfer and the Role of PEFT in Sub-1B Mathematical Reasoning
2606.06920.paper_summary: Deploying Small Language Models (SLMs) on edge devices requires efficient fine-tuning strategies that adapt models to new tasks without degrading their general capabilities. In this study, we benchmark five sub-1B models (135M-1B) on mathematical reasoning tasks and uncover a critical vulnerability: Full Fine-Tuning (Full FT) actively harms performance in models under 300M parameters, often dropping accuracy below zero-shot baselines. This "negative transfer" makes Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning (PEFT) not just an efficiency preference, but a stability requirement. We find that while Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) and Weight-Decomposed LoRA (DoRA) perform comparably, their strengths vary by task; DoRA excels in complex reasoning (GSM8K), while LoRA dominates pattern matching (OrcaMath). In particular, Full FT is outperformed by LoRA on aligned models (Qwen2.5-0.5B) and even by simple 5-shot In-Context Learning on the smallest architectures (SmolLM2-135M). Based on these findings, we recommend defaulting to PEFT for all aligned sub-1B models and caution against Full FT for any architecture smaller than 500M parameters to prevent catastrophic forgetting. Reproduction of this work can be found at https://github.com/gulguluu/tiny-slm-finetune-compare.
2606.06920.paper_summary_zh: 在邊緣設備上部署小型語言模型（SLMs）需要有效的微調策略，以便在不降低模型一般能力的情況下將其適應於新任務。在這項研究中，我們對五個參數少於1B的模型（135M-1B）在數學推理任務上進行基準測試，並揭示了一個關鍵的漏洞：完全微調（Full FT）會對參數少於300M的模型的性能造成積極損害，通常會使準確率低於零-shot 基準。這種「負轉移」使得參數高效微調（PEFT）不僅僅是一種效率偏好，而是一種穩定性需求。我們發現，雖然低秩適應（LoRA）和權重分解LoRA（DoRA）的表現相當，但它們的優勢因任務而異；DoRA在複雜推理（GSM8K）中表現優異，而LoRA在模式匹配（OrcaMath）中佔據主導地位。特別是，在對齊模型（Qwen2.5-0.5B）上，LoRA的表現超過了完全微調，甚至在最小架構（SmolLM2-135M）上，簡單的5-shot上下文學習也超過了完全微調。根據這些發現，我們建議對所有對齊的子1B模型默認使用PEFT，並對任何小於500M參數的架構對完全微調保持謹慎，以防止災難性遺忘。該研究的重現可以在 https://github.com/gulguluu/tiny-slm-finetune-compare 找到。
2606.06920.author: Rahul Nair et.al.
